issue.title: feat(api-key): add api key management plugin page
issue.body: Add the API Key plugin page under the plugins route tree. The page includes list, search, create/edit, status toggle, masked key copy, and localized route metadata.

comment.body:
非内置插件需要额外发布：
https://docs.fba.wu-clan.cc/fastapi_best_architecture_docs/plugin/share.html

issue.title: 建议扩展项目定位：同时支持B端管理端和C端用户场景
issue.body:
你好，目前项目主要聚焦于企业后台管理系统，做的确实很好，学到了很多。但实际开发中，很多项目都需要同时支持：
- B端：管理员/企业内部用户使用的后台
- C端：普通用户使用的前台/应用端
有考虑过同时支持 C 端用户吗？提升项目的通用性和实用性

comment.body: 有什么好的想法？当前最便捷的方式是通过用户表 is_staff 列控制是否可登陆后台

issue.title: git_graph: Show related commits when you hover over a lane

labels.name: cla-signed
labels.description: The user has signed the Contributor License Agreement

labels.name: community champion
labels.description: Issues filed by our amazing community champions! 🫶

issue.body:
This PR adds support for showig the related commits to a git graph lane, when you hover over it.

**Example**:

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c901f979-8d2a-4313-8a2d-53be2d7aa76e

Before you mark this PR as ready for review, make sure that you have:
- [ ] Added a solid test coverage and/or screenshots from doing manual testing
- [ ] Done a self-review taking into account security and performance aspects
- [ ] Aligned any UI changes with the [UI checklist](https://github.com/zed-industries/zed/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#uiux-checklist)

Release Notes:

- N/A

comment.body: I wonder why it's not a click? Have avoided confusion when there are too many lines.

issue.title: 请问vben选择web-antd还是web-ele，哪个稳定？
issue.body:
请问下，选择哪个ui框架更好？
│  ● @vben/web-antd
│  ○ @vben/web-ele

我之前一直用react+antd的，最近因为在用ruoyi，所以想选择使用vben。

想请教下ui框架选择 web-antd还是 web-ele？ antd是vben默认的，但是ant design vue 1年多没更新，团队成员也不是很多，就想着选一个能稳定点的，能持续更新的。 不知道实际使用的大佬们大多数是选择哪个，element-plus在vben上适配的如何，请大佬推荐下。

payload.description: FastAPI Best Architecture front-end implementation built on Vben Admin Antd

issue.title: Bug: 低版本 node 存在 ts 配置文件加载问题
issue.body:
### Version

Vben Admin V5

### Describe the bug?

关于 *.config.ts 配置文件的影响：

```log
Failed to load configuration file.
D:\xxx\oxfmt.config.ts
Ensure the file has a valid default export of a JSON-serializable configuration object.

 ERROR  An unexpected error occurred:
 Command failed with exit code 1: oxfmt

 ELIFECYCLE  Command failed with exit code 1.
```

https://nodejs.org/download/release/v22.22.0/docs/api/typescript.html#type-stripping

### Reproduction

无

### System Info

```shell
无
```

### Relevant log output

```shell

```

### Validations

- [x] Read the [docs](https://doc.vben.pro/)
- [x] Ensure the code is up to date. (Some issues have been fixed in the latest version)
- [x] I have searched the [existing issues](https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin/issues) and checked that my issue does not duplicate any existing issues.
- [x] Check that this is a concrete bug. For Q&A open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin/discussions) or join our [Discord Chat Server](https://discord.gg/8GuAdwDhj6).
- [x] The provided reproduction is a [minimal reproducible example](https://stackoverflow.com/help/minimal-reproducible-example) of the bug.

comment.body: 我是在 win 基于 22.15.0 触发的，升级到 22.22.1 就可以正常执行了
